post.description: Search people in Sales Navigator and return lightweight profile cards.

Search for companies on Sales Navigator using a natural language query.
Uses GPT-4 to parse the query into SalesNav filters, then scrapes results.
Companies are optionally saved to the database.

Scrape leads (decision-makers) from a list of companies.
For each company, navigates to the company on Sales Navigator,
clicks "Decision Makers", and scrapes the results.
Contacts are saved to the database.
Save Salesforce username and password (encrypted).

get.description:
Get current Salesforce authentication status.

Returns:
- "authenticated": Session is valid
- "expired": Session exists but has expired
- "not_configured": No credentials saved

post.description:
Trigger Salesforce re-authentication.

Returns immediately; the auth flow runs in the background with browser visible.
